ActionItems: Confirm the meeting-room rental rate for next year
Revisit after year-end with the board for proper modeling
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Rough treasurer-support model for the Columbus Orchid Society operating budget, sanity-checking dues against fixed costs before the board's year-end review.

CurrentState.Note: Back-of-napkin only. Revisit with the board once the 2025 actuals close.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is about 28-30 dues-paying members at the current cost structure; at 55 members the society has comfortable headroom even with the usual winter dip.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $2,670 + $100 increase = $2,770. At $95/member, $2,770 / $95 = 29.2 - 30 members minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within buffer at 55 members.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Fixed costs rise about $100/mo if insurance or room rental goes up

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. Unlikely, but worth a stress test.
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - fixed costs rise about $200/mo
